name: F&G Annuities & Life Inc. 7.950% Senior Notes due 2053
summary: F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. provides annuity and life insurance products. Headquartered in Des Moines, Iowa, the company focuses on offering fixed indexed annuities and life insurance. F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. aims to help Americans turn their savings into guaranteed income that lasts.
